options.content:
{{temp}} °C
Hi{{hi}}° Lo{{lo}}°
Humidity {{humidity}}%
Wind km/h {{wind}} / {{gust}}
30m km/h {{wind_30m}} / {{gust_30m}}
Rain
{{rain_rate}}mm/h
{{rain_fc}}fc
{{rain_total}}tot

targets.query:
import "array"
import "math"
import "strings"
import "date"
import "timezone"

option location = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Prague")

temp = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather" and r._field == "temperature")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

maxtemp = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weatherforecast" and r._field == "maxtemp")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

mintemp = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weatherforecast" and r._field == "mintemp")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

humidity = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather" and r._field == "humidity")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

precip = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weatherforecast" and r._field == "precip")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

precipRate = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather" and r._field == "precipRate")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

windSpeed = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather" and r._field == "windSpeed")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

windGust = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather" and r._field == "windGust")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

precipTotal = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather" and r._field == "precipTotal")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)


wind30m = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather" and r._field == "windSpeed")
  |> max()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

windGust30m = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: -30m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather" and r._field == "windGust")
  |> max()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

hourly_data = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: today(), stop: date.add(d: 1d, to: today()))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "TempForecast" and r._field == "temperature")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _encoded: string(v: date.hour(t: r._time)) + ":" + string(v: r._value)}))
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_encoded")

hourly_str = strings.joinStr(arr: hourly_data, v: ",")

rain_data = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: today(), stop: date.add(d: 1d, to: today()))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "RainForecast" and r._field == "precipitation")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _encoded: string(v: date.hour(t: r._time)) + ":" + string(v: r._value)}))
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_encoded")

rain_str = strings.joinStr(arr: rain_data, v: ",")


wind_data = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: today(), stop: date.add(d: 1d, to: today()))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "WindForecast" and r._field == "wind_speed")
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _encoded: string(v: date.hour(t: r._time)) + ":" + string(v: r._value)}))
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "_encoded")

wind_str = strings.joinStr(arr: wind_data, v: ",")

array.from(rows: [{
  temp: math.round(x: temp._value * 10.0) / 10.0,
  hi: math.round(x: maxtemp._value),
  lo: math.round(x: mintemp._value),
  humidity: math.round(x: humidity._value),
  rain_fc: math.round(x: precip._value * 10.0) / 10.0,
  rain_rate: math.round(x: precipRate._value * 10.0) / 10.0,
  rain_total: math.round(x: precipTotal._value * 10.0) / 10.0,
  wind: math.round(x: windSpeed._value),
  gust: math.round(x: windGust._value),
  wind_30m: math.round(x: wind30m._value),
  gust_30m: math.round(x: windGust30m._value),
  hourly: hourly_str,
  rain_hourly: rain_str,
  wind_hourly: wind_str,
}])

options.content:
Obyvacka {{oby_t}}° ▸{{oby_set}}° {{oby_h}}% {{#if (gt oby_on 0)}}▲{{/if}}
Pracovna {{pra_t}}° ▸{{pra_set}}° {{pra_h}}% {{#if (gt pra_on 0)}}▲{{/if}}
Julinka {{jul_t}}° ▸{{jul_set}}° {{#if (gt jul_on 0)}}▲{{/if}}
Kubo {{kub_t}}° ▸{{kub_set}}° {{#if (gt kub_on 0)}}▲{{/if}}
Spalna {{spa_t}}° ▸{{spa_set}}° {{#if (gt spa_on 0)}}▲{{/if}}
Krb {{#if (gt krb_w 20)}}ON{{else}}OFF{{/if}}
Krb T {{krb_t}}°
COP 24h {{cop}}
CO2 {{co2}} ppm
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.query:
import "array"
import "math"

obyvacka_temp = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather" and r._field == "temperature_upstairs_in")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

obyvacka_hum = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather" and r._field == "humidity_upstairs_in")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

obyvacka_set = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rehau_set" and r._field == "Obyvacka")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

pracovna_temp = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rehau" and r._field == "Pracovna")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

pracovna_hum = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rehau_hum" and r._field == "Pracovna")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

pracovna_set = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rehau_set" and r._field == "Pracovna")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

julinka_temp = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netatmo" and r._field == "julinka")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

kubo_temp = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netatmo" and r._field == "kubo")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

spalna_temp = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netatmo" and r._field == "spalna")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

co2 = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "weather" and r._field == "moes_co2")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

krb_power = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "krb" and r._field == "apower")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

krb_temp = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "krb" and r._field == "tC")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

cop = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Estia" and r._field == "cop_24h")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

oby_heat = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rehau_output" and r._field == "Obyvacka-1")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

pra_heat = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "rehau_output" and r._field == "Pracovna")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

jul_heat = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "on" and r._field == "julinka")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

kub_heat = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "on" and r._field == "kubo")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

spa_heat = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "on" and r._field == "spalna")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

julinka_set = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temp_target" and r._field == "julinka")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

kubo_set = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temp_target" and r._field == "kubo")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

spalna_set = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temp_target" and r._field == "spalna")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

array.from(rows: [{
  oby_t: if exists obyvacka_temp._value then math.round(x: float(v: obyvacka_temp._value) * 10.0) / 10.0 else 0.0,
  oby_h: if exists obyvacka_hum._value then math.round(x: float(v: obyvacka_hum._value)) else 0.0,
  oby_set: if exists obyvacka_set._value then math.round(x: float(v: obyvacka_set._value) * 10.0) / 10.0 else 0.0,
  pra_t: if exists pracovna_temp._value then math.round(x: float(v: pracovna_temp._value) * 10.0) / 10.0 else 0.0,
  pra_h: if exists pracovna_hum._value then math.round(x: float(v: pracovna_hum._value)) else 0.0,
  pra_set: if exists pracovna_set._value then math.round(x: float(v: pracovna_set._value) * 10.0) / 10.0 else 0.0,
  jul_t: if exists julinka_temp._value then math.round(x: float(v: julinka_temp._value) * 10.0) / 10.0 else 0.0,
  kub_t: if exists kubo_temp._value then math.round(x: float(v: kubo_temp._value) * 10.0) / 10.0 else 0.0,
  spa_t: if exists spalna_temp._value then math.round(x: float(v: spalna_temp._value) * 10.0) / 10.0 else 0.0,
  jul_set: if exists julinka_set._value then math.round(x: float(v: julinka_set._value) * 10.0) / 10.0 else 0.0,
  kub_set: if exists kubo_set._value then math.round(x: float(v: kubo_set._value) * 10.0) / 10.0 else 0.0,
  spa_set: if exists spalna_set._value then math.round(x: float(v: spalna_set._value) * 10.0) / 10.0 else 0.0,
  co2: if exists co2._value then math.round(x: float(v: co2._value)) else 0.0,
  krb_w: if exists krb_power._value then math.round(x: float(v: krb_power._value)) else 0.0,
  krb_t: if exists krb_temp._value then math.round(x: float(v: krb_temp._value) * 10.0) / 10.0 else 0.0,
  cop: if exists cop._value then math.round(x: float(v: cop._value) * 100.0) / 100.0 else 0.0,
  oby_on: if exists oby_heat._value then float(v: oby_heat._value) else 0.0,
  pra_on: if exists pra_heat._value then float(v: pra_heat._value) else 0.0,
  jul_on: if exists jul_heat._value then float(v: jul_heat._value) else 0.0,
  kub_on: if exists kub_heat._value then float(v: kub_heat._value) else 0.0,
  spa_on: if exists spa_heat._value then float(v: spa_heat._value) else 0.0,
}])

options.content:
▲ SOLD
{{vb_prod}} kWh
▼ BOUGHT
{{vb_cons}} kWh
{{#unless (gt car_conn 0)}}
—
{{/unless}}
TODAY
Consumed{{d_cons}} kWh
Produced{{d_gen}} kWh
{{#if (gt meter 0)}}+{{meter}}{{else}}{{meter}}{{/if}} kW
{{#if (lt meter -0.25)}}Import{{else}}{{#if (gt meter 0.25)}}Export{{else}}Balanced{{/if}}{{/if}}
Grid
MONTH
Consumed{{m_cons}} kWh
Produced{{m_gen}} kWh
options.defaultContent: The query didn't return any results.

targets.query:
import "math"
import "array"
import "date"

// ── Live readings ──
prod_raw = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "FVE" and r._field == "power" and r.string == "all")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

cons_raw = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "FVE" and r._field == "consumption")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

bat_raw = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "FVE" and r._field == "battery_load")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

soc_raw = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "FVE" and r._field == "soc")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

// ── Grid meter power (negative = import, positive = export) ──
meter_default = array.from(rows: [{_time: 2000-01-01T00:00:00Z, _value: 0.0}])

meter_real = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "FVE" and r._field == "meter_power")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

meter_rec = union(tables: [meter_default, meter_real])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

// ── Wallbox (safe — may have no data at all) ──
charge_default = array.from(rows: [{_time: 2000-01-01T00:00:00Z, _value: 0.0}])

charge_real = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Car" and r._field == "charging_wallbox_power")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

charge_rec = union(tables: [charge_default, charge_real])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

// ── Car connected (1 = plugged in, 0 = not) ──
conn_default = array.from(rows: [{_time: 2000-01-01T00:00:00Z, _value: 0.0}])

conn_real = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Car" and r._field == "car_connected")
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

conn_rec = union(tables: [conn_default, conn_real])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

// ── Daily stats (today's running totals) ──
d_cons_raw = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "FVE" and r._field == "consumption_day")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

d_gen_raw = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "FVE" and r._field == "generation_day")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

// ── Monthly stats (sum of daily maxes for current month) ──
month_start = date.truncate(t: now(), unit: 1mo)

m_cons_raw = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: month_start)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "FVE" and r._field == "consumption_day")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max)
  |> sum()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

m_gen_raw = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: month_start)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "FVE" and r._field == "generation_day")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: max)
  |> sum()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)


// ── Virtual Battery (CEZ) ──
vb_charge_raw = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cez" and r._field == "virtual_battery")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

vb_prod_raw = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cez" and r._field == "aggregated_production")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

vb_cons_raw = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: -1d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "cez" and r._field == "aggregated_consumption")
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

// ── Extract values with null safety ──
prod   = if exists prod_raw._value then float(v: prod_raw._value) else 0.0
cons_total = if exists cons_raw._value then float(v: cons_raw._value) else 0.0
bat    = if exists bat_raw._value  then float(v: bat_raw._value)  else 0.0
soc    = if exists soc_raw._value  then float(v: soc_raw._value)  else 0.0
meter  = if exists meter_rec._value then float(v: meter_rec._value) else 0.0
charge = if exists charge_rec._value then float(v: charge_rec._value) else 0.0
cons   = if cons_total - charge > 0.0 then cons_total - charge else 0.0
car_conn = if exists conn_rec._value then float(v: conn_rec._value) else 0.0
d_cons = if exists d_cons_raw._value then float(v: d_cons_raw._value) else 0.0
d_gen  = if exists d_gen_raw._value  then float(v: d_gen_raw._value)  else 0.0
m_cons = if exists m_cons_raw._value then float(v: m_cons_raw._value) else 0.0
m_gen  = if exists m_gen_raw._value  then float(v: m_gen_raw._value)  else 0.0

// Self-sufficiency: today's generation / consumption * 100
self_suf = if d_cons > 0.0 then math.round(x: d_gen / d_cons * 100.0) else 0.0


// Virtual Battery values
vb_charge = if exists vb_charge_raw._value then float(v: vb_charge_raw._value) else 0.0
vb_prod   = if exists vb_prod_raw._value then float(v: vb_prod_raw._value) else 0.0
vb_cons   = if exists vb_cons_raw._value then float(v: vb_cons_raw._value) else 0.0
vb_pct    = if vb_cons > 0.0 then math.round(x: vb_prod / vb_cons * 100.0) else 0.0


// Battery time remaining (hours until DoD floor)
dod = float(v: ${InverterDepthOfDischarge})
min_soc = 100.0 - dod
usable_pct = if soc > min_soc then soc - min_soc else 0.0
usable_kwh = usable_pct / 100.0 * 20.0
bat_discharge_kw = if bat > 50.0 then bat / 1000.0 else 0.0
bat_hours_raw = if bat_discharge_kw > 0.0 then usable_kwh / bat_discharge_kw else 0.0
bat_hrs_v = math.floor(x: bat_hours_raw)
bat_mins_v = math.round(x: (bat_hours_raw - math.floor(x: bat_hours_raw)) * 60.0)

// Battery time to full charge
bat_charge_kw = if bat < -50.0 then math.abs(x: bat) / 1000.0 else 0.0
remaining_pct = 100.0 - soc
remaining_kwh = remaining_pct / 100.0 * 20.0
bat_chg_hours_raw = if bat_charge_kw > 0.0 then remaining_kwh / bat_charge_kw else 0.0
bat_chg_hrs_v = math.floor(x: bat_chg_hours_raw)
bat_chg_mins_v = math.round(x: (bat_chg_hours_raw - math.floor(x: bat_chg_hours_raw)) * 60.0)

array.from(rows: [{
  prod:      math.round(x: prod / 1000.0 * 100.0) / 100.0,
  cons:      math.round(x: cons / 1000.0 * 100.0) / 100.0,
  soc:       math.round(x: soc),
  bat:       math.round(x: bat / 1000.0 * 100.0) / 100.0,
  meter:     math.round(x: meter / 1000.0 * 100.0) / 100.0,
  charge_w:  math.round(x: charge / 1000.0 * 100.0) / 100.0,
  car_conn:  math.round(x: car_conn),
  d_cons:    math.round(x: d_cons * 10.0) / 10.0,
  d_gen:     math.round(x: d_gen * 10.0) / 10.0,
  m_cons:    math.round(x: m_cons),
  m_gen:     math.round(x: m_gen),
  self_suf:  self_suf,
  vb_charge: math.round(x: vb_charge * 10.0) / 10.0,
  vb_prod:   math.round(x: vb_prod),
  vb_cons:   math.round(x: vb_cons),
  vb_pct:    vb_pct,
  bat_hrs:   bat_hrs_v,
  bat_mins:  bat_mins_v,
  bat_chg_hrs:  bat_chg_hrs_v,
  bat_chg_mins: bat_chg_mins_v,
}])

from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "becka" and
    r._field == "tC"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn:last)

from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "FVE" and
    r._field == "consumption" or r._field == "bojlery"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn:mean)

from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "FVE" and
    r._field == "battery_load"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn:mean)

from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "FVE" and
    r._field == "power" and r.string != "1" and r.string != "2"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn:mean)

options.content:
OTE TodayCZK/kWh
{{cur_price}}
now · {{cur_hour}}:00
MIN
{{min_price}} @{{min_hour}}:00
MAX
{{max_price}} @{{max_hour}}:00

targets.query:
import "math"
import "experimental"
import "array"
import "date"
import "timezone"

option location = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Prague")
_loc = timezone.location(name: "Europe/Prague")
_zero = 1970-01-01T00:00:00Z
_def_cur = array.from(rows: [{_value: 0.0, _time: _zero}])
_def_min = array.from(rows: [{_value: 999.0, _time: _zero}])
_def_max = array.from(rows: [{_value: -999.0, _time: _zero}])

// OTE: all hourly prices for today (always full day, ignores dashboard time range)
ote_raw = from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: today(), stop: experimental.addDuration(d: 25h, to: today()))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "OTE" and r._field == "price_czk_kwh" and r.type == "hourly")
  |> keep(columns: ["_value", "_time"])

// Current hour (Prague time)
// Data stored at end-of-hour: 8-9am price at 09:00, so filter by hour+1
now_hour = date.hour(t: now(), location: _loc)
ote_cur_raw = ote_raw
  |> filter(fn: (r) => date.hour(t: r._time, location: _loc) == now_hour + 1)
  |> last()
ote_cur = union(tables: [_def_cur, ote_cur_raw]) |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"]) |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

// Min price (default 999 so real prices always win)
ote_min_r = union(tables: [_def_min, ote_raw |> min()])
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_value"]) |> first()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

// Max price (default -999 so real prices always win)
ote_max_r = union(tables: [_def_max, ote_raw |> max()])
  |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true) |> first()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

cur_price = ote_cur._value
min_price = ote_min_r._value
max_price = ote_max_r._value
// Subtract 1 from hour: timestamps are end-of-hour, display start-of-hour
min_hour = if ote_min_r._time == _zero then 0 else date.hour(t: ote_min_r._time, location: _loc) - 1
max_hour = if ote_max_r._time == _zero then 0 else date.hour(t: ote_max_r._time, location: _loc) - 1

// Dot position on the range bar (clamped 2-98%)
_raw_pct = if max_price == min_price then 50.0 else (cur_price - min_price) / (max_price - min_price) * 100.0
dot_pct = if _raw_pct < 2.0 then 2.0 else if _raw_pct > 98.0 then 98.0 else _raw_pct

array.from(rows: [{
  cur_price: string(v: math.round(x: cur_price * 100.0) / 100.0),
  cur_hour: string(v: now_hour),
  min_price: string(v: math.round(x: min_price * 100.0) / 100.0),
  min_hour: string(v: min_hour),
  max_price: string(v: math.round(x: max_price * 100.0) / 100.0),
  max_hour: string(v: max_hour),
  dot_pct: string(v: math.round(x: dot_pct)),
}])

import "date"
import "experimental"

from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: experimental.addDuration(d: 5h, to:date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1d)), stop: experimental.addDuration(d: 18h, to:date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1d)))
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "SolarForecast" and
    (r._field == "30m_10p_cummulative" or r._field == "30m_50p_cummulative" or r._field == "30m_90p_cummulative")
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30m, fn:last)

import "date"
import "experimental"

from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: experimental.addDuration(d: 5h, to:date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1d)), stop: experimental.addDuration(d: 18h, to:date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1d)))
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "FVE" and
    r._field == "generation_day"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30m, fn:mean)

import "date"
import "experimental"

from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: experimental.addDuration(d: 5h, to:date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1d)), stop: experimental.addDuration(d: 18h, to:date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1d)))
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "SolarForecast" and
    r._field == "30m_50p_cummulative"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30m , fn:last)

import "date"
import "experimental"

from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: experimental.addDuration(d: 5h, to:date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1d)), stop: experimental.addDuration(d: 18h, to:date.truncate(t: v.timeRangeStart, unit: 1d)))
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "FVE" and
    r._field == "generation_day"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30m, fn:last)

from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "FVE" and
    r._field == "curr"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn:last)

from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "FVE" and
    r._field == "battery_charged" and r.sum == "total"
  )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({battery_charged: (r._value / 14.8)}))

from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "weather" and
    r._field == "solarRadiation"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn:mean)

from(bucket: "default")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "FVE" and
    r._field == "diag"
  )
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn:last, createEmpty: false)
